Maths:
The radius of circle is 14cm. What is the area of the circle (Take pi as 22/7)?
A. 616cm2
B. 313cm2

In a right angled triangle the sum of the squares of the adjacent sides always equals the square of the hypotenuse. The theory above is popularly called?
A. Euler's theory
B. Pythagoras theory

The maximum value of a function is gotten when ____?
A. The first derivative is 0 and the second derivative is positive?
B. The first derivative is 0 and the second derivative is negative
Physics:

A. speed
B. velocity

The rate of change of velocity with respect to time is known as ___-?
A. acceleration
B. speed

The rate of change of acceleration with time is knonw as ____?
A. acceleration
B. jerk

A. 30N
B. 0.3N
